CustomField.description: Point value awarded to a Form_Answer when its value satisfies Pass_Criteria__c. Default 1; 0 means informational-only (still tracked as pass/fail but contributes no score). Per Pillar 5 the only supported aggregation is sum-of-weights — averages and weighted-categorical models are deferred (see docs/phase-2-pillar-5-scoring-findings.md).
CustomField.label: Weight
